title: Neocentema alternifolia
intro: Neocentema alternifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the desert rose or neocentema. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and pain, due to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Neocentema alternifolia include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Neocentema alternifolia include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions.
